title: Super Pow
hints: Break down the exponent using the decimal structure: the number represented by digits [d1, d2] equals 10*d1 + d2.
Use the property that x^(10*y + z) equals (x^y)^10 * x^z to process digits left-to-right.
You need two helper operations: raising a base to the 10th power, and raising a base to a single-digit power, both modulo 1337.
